name: Remifentanil
executiveSummary: Opioid anesthetic adjunct to general anesthesia. Rapid onset and rapid metabolism.
indications:
## Main indications

Opioid anesthetic adjunct to general anesthesia. Rapid onset and rapid metabolism.

> Adjust according to institutional protocol and medical prescription.

pediatrico.dose: 0.5 µg/kg bolus over 30 min. Maintenance: 0.1–0.3 µg/kg/min
pediatrico.notes: SPECIALIST USE ONLY. Do not administer epidurally or intrathecally (glycine in the formulation may cause neurotoxicity).

stability:
## Stability

- Reconstitute per package insert; use within 24 h.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

Apnea, nausea, bradyarrhythmia, hypotension, respiratory depression. Higher frequency of wooden chest. See opioid analgesics section.
